name: CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc.
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc., founded in 2011, develops the AI-native Falcon cybersecurity platform, an AI Security Cloud that protects endpoints, cloud workloads, identities, and AI systems. The platform offers 33 cloud modules via SaaS subscription covering endpoint security, managed security services, identity protection, next-generation SIEM, threat intelligence, data protection, SOAR, and AI-driven workflow automation, serving customers through a single lightweight sensor and proprietary graph technologies.

products.name: CrowdStrike Falcon Platform
products.description: AI-native, cloud-native cybersecurity platform with single lightweight sensor covering endpoints, cloud workloads, identities, and third-party data sources.

products.name: Threat Graph
products.description: AI and behavioral pattern-matching engine correlating trillions of cybersecurity events to identify and prevent threats in real time.

products.name: Intel Graph
products.description: Analyzes and correlates threat intelligence to visualize connections between adversaries and attacks, mapped to MITRE ATT&CK framework.

products.name: Asset Graph
products.description: Dynamically monitors and tracks complex interactions among enterprise assets for security hygiene and posture management.

products.name: Enterprise Graph
products.description: Unified intelligence layer combining graph technologies to correlate and contextualize Security Cloud data for detection and response.

products.name: Falcon Managed Detection and Response
products.description: Managed security service providing detection and response through real-world security operations.

products.name: Falcon Threat Intelligence
products.description: Threat intelligence services delivering adversary context and indicators of attack.

products.name: Falcon Identity Protection
products.description: Cloud module providing identity protection against identity-based attacks and abuse.

products.name: Falcon Next-Gen SIEM
products.description: Next-generation security information and event management and log management cloud module.

products.name: Falcon Data Protection
products.description: Cloud module for data protection across enterprise environments.

products.name: Falcon SaaS Security Posture Management
products.description: Cloud module for managing and securing SaaS application security posture.

products.name: Falcon SOAR
products.description: Security Orchestration, Automation and Response with AI-powered workflow automation.

products.name: AI Security for Generative AI Systems
products.description: AI detection and response module securing generative AI and AI-driven systems.
